query:
-- rows ที่ payment_time IS NULL ในปี 2026 - กระจายตามเดือน
SELECT LEFT(paid_at, 7) as ym, COUNT(*) as cnt 
FROM payment_transactions WHERE section='ff365' AND payment_time IS NULL AND paid_at >= '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY ym ORDER BY ym;

-- rows ที่ payment_time มีค่า ในปี 2026 - กระจายตามเดือน  
SELECT LEFT(paid_at, 7) as ym, COUNT(*) as cnt 
FROM payment_transactions WHERE section='ff365' AND payment_time IS NOT NULL AND paid_at >= '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY ym ORDER BY ym;

SELECT LEFT(paid_at, 7) as ym, COUNT(*) as cnt 
FROM payment_transactions WHERE section='ff365' AND payment_time IS NULL AND paid_at >= '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY ym ORDER BY ym;

-- rows ที่ payment_time มีค่า ในปี 2026 - กระจายตามเดือน  
SELECT LEFT(paid_at, 7) as ym, COUNT(*) as cnt 
FROM payment_transactions WHERE section='ff365' AND payment_time IS NOT NULL AND paid_at >= '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY ym ORDER BY ym;
